ConnectionStrings._OperationsDb_example: Host=server;Database=operations;Username=ops_api;Pooling=true;Minimum Pool Size=2;Maximum Pool Size=20;Connection Idle Lifetime=300

DiskMonitoring._comment: Display thresholds for the disk page; the sync pipeline computes alert_status using DISK_WARN_PCT/DISK_CRIT_PCT_DEFAULT env vars set in ADO. Keep these aligned.

Auditing._comment: SigningKey signs attestation tokens (HMAC). Leave blank here and set Auditing__SigningKey (32+ bytes) as an env var in every non-Development environment — the app refuses to start otherwise. BaseUrl builds the attest.html links; CcAuditMailbox is CC'd on every attestation email.
